system.damage: trample d8+3 with disadvantage (hand, close) or ice-tusks d8+7 with disadvantage (reach, forceful, messy, crude, 1 piercing)
system.specialQuality: tethered to its dome but far-ranging; perfect memory; unable to lie

selected: to amuse itself at the expense of others

system.moves:
- Fly quickly across the skies
- Manifest a mammoth-like form of freezing mist and ice (harmed only by salt, fire, heat)
- Suck the strength and warmth from anyone they trample
- Reveal just enough to cause trouble

The Rime Lords created these mighty spir- its to act as emissaries and spies. A few still remain, tethered to the meditation-halls in which they were made but roaming the Whitefangs in search of novelty and diversion. They have grown bored in their masters’ absence, and from boredom has grown a subtle cruelty. The people of the Whitefangs treat them with respect, for they are still the emissar- ies of the Rime Lords. But they also know better than to trust their counsel.
